MissingPerson.title: MissingPerson
MissingPerson.description: A record of a missing person.

registrationNumber.description: Unique registration number for the case.

relation.description: Relation of the missing person to the reporter or parent/guardian name.

dateMissingFrom.description: Date when the person went missing.

lastSeen.description: Location where the person was last seen.

languagesKnown.description: Languages known by the missing person.

district.description: District where the person went missing.

policeStationArea.description: Police station area handling the case.

mentalHealthStatus.description: Mental health status of the missing person.

personImageWebLink.description: URL link to the image of the missing person.

reporterUid.description: UID of the user who reported the missing person.

status.description: Current status of the missing person.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the record was created.
